places.name: Beijing Road
places.address: 北京路, 人民街道, 越秀区, 广东省
places.note: Pedestrian shopping street built atop excavated ancient road layers visible under glass

places.name: Canton Tower
places.address: 阅江西路, 赤岗街道, 海珠区, 广东省
places.note: 600m observation and broadcast tower, second tallest in China, lit up spectacularly at night

places.name: Guangdong Museum
places.address: 珠江东路, 猎德街道, 天河区, 广东省
places.note: Large modern museum covering Cantonese history, art, and natural history

places.name: Guangzhou Opera House
places.address: 珠江西路, 猎德街道, 天河区, 广东省
places.note: Zaha Hadid-designed performing arts centre on the Pearl River, striking architecture

places.name: Yuexiu Park
places.address: 洪桥街道, 越秀区, 广东省, 中国
places.note: Guangzhou's largest urban park, home to the Five Rams Statue and the city museum

places.name: Zhenhai Tower
places.address: 南越路, 洪桥街道, 越秀区, 广东省
places.note: 16th century red pagoda inside Yuexiu Park, now the Guangzhou City Museum

places.name: Sun Yat-sen Memorial Hall
places.address: 应元路, 洪桥街道, 越秀区, 广东省
places.note: Octagonal hall and museum on the site of his presidential palace from the 1920s

places.name: Chen Clan Ancestral Hall
places.address: 陈家祠道, 金花街道, 荔湾区, 广东省
places.note: Elaborate late 19th century ancestral shrine and school with outstanding decorative arts

places.name: Yongqing Fang
places.address: 恩宁路, 多宝街道, 荔湾区, 广东省
places.note: Restored Qing-era alley now lined with independent bars, coffee shops, and boutiques

places.name: Shangxiajiu Pedestrian Street
places.address: 下九路, 华林街道, 荔湾区, 广东省
places.note: Lively historic street food corridor, best explored along the western half

places.name: Baiyun Mountain
places.address: 白云区, 广东省, 中国
places.note: Cloud-shrouded mountain north of the city with scenic trails and teahouses

places.name: Sacred Heart Cathedral
places.address: 玉子巷, 人民街道, 越秀区, 广东省
places.note: One of the world's largest all-stone Gothic cathedrals, completed 1888

places.name: Liurong Temple
places.address: 中山六路, 六榕街道, 越秀区, 广东省
places.note: Temple of Six Banyan Trees, founded 537 AD, with a soaring octagonal pagoda

places.name: Guangxiao Temple
places.address: 光孝路, 六榕街道, 越秀区, 广东省
places.note: Possibly the oldest temple in Guangdong, known for flower offerings instead of incense
